station_address: Bandra Kurla Complex Rd, G Block BKC, Bharat Nagar, Bandra East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400051
text:
Good arrangement for multiple gas filling, for cars and Autorickshaws. Even if the queue is long, it doesn't take much time to reach the station. Assistants are present to coordinate the vehicles.
Gas is continuous because it's an online station.

station_address: Bandra Kurla Complex Rd, G Block BKC, Bharat Nagar, Bandra East, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400051
text: Place is ok. One of the major CNG filling stations . Queue management is ok. Unfortunately we ended up there on a day and time when they had shut down the compressors for maintenance. A 1 hr break in operations and there was a huge backlog ! We almost missed our flight ( were on an UBER ride )

text: Sometimes you can get cng even at midnight. One of the reliable cng station in Bandra East. But the vehicle line system here can be a bit tricky for a new person. I have often seen waiting people quarrelling because of it. Toilet can be improvised. Pricing and all are the same. CNG Pressure is always been maintained here
